research: GeoMine Research phase-2 NWT gold tenure subtraction and anomaly tracing
method_boundary: Official active mineral tenure geometry was unioned and differenced from broad WGS84 screening bboxes using the GNWT ArcGIS GeometryServer. Candidate ranking used 0.10 x 0.05 degree tenure-clear grid cells. This is research screening, not legal staking advice or a Qualified Person opinion.

windows.name: South Rae / Hearne margin south of MacKay
windows.priority: First priority for claim-gap follow-up because top Au till cluster is not inside active tenure polygons in this screening pass and the window has the lowest tenure pressure relative to evidence.

windows.name: East Slave Lac de Gras-MacKay-McCrea
windows.priority: Highest geochemical anomaly strength, but several top Au samples are inside active tenure polygons; use tenure as the first filter.

windows.name: Central Slave Indin-Colomac-Courageous
windows.priority: Belt-extension portfolio only; avoid known project cores and focus on parallel structures, BIF contacts, mafic sill analogs and tenure-edge gaps.
